name: google_sheets_create_worksheet
description: Creates a new worksheet in a Google Sheet.

output_hint.description: REQUIRED. Natural language description of what data you want from the results. Example: 'just the title and created date' or 'only items with status active, showing id and name'. A filter will be automatically generated to extract this data.

items.description: null Headers are REQUIRED for worksheets that will be used with add_row or update_row operations. Without headers in the first row, these operations will fail, unless you call Create Column later.

overwrite.description: Overwrite existing worksheet with the same title
